description: Use a single rounded search shell split into a few high-signal inputs and one dominant submit action.
evidence_notes: Airbnb uses a segmented desktop search shell and collapses it to a single search trigger on mobile.
rules: Only include the minimum inputs needed to start the search flow.
Make one submit action visually dominant inside the search shell.
Collapse complex segmented search into a simpler trigger on mobile when space is limited.
implementation_notes: Build as a flex container with internal dividers and a fixed submit button zone.
Use semantic labels and clear focus styles for each segment.
Prefer opening advanced search details in a sheet or modal on mobile rather than shrinking every field into one row.
avoid_when: The workflow does not begin with a search task.
The product requires too many required fields up front.
The segmentation would create cramped or ambiguous labels on smaller screens.
